notes: Heavy-artillery specialist. No Barracks or Factory at all -- Demolition Plant (Tank Obliterator, Earthshaker) is the base's only troop production, so it fields no infantry or light vehicles whatsoever, the most extreme 'skips a tier' base in the roster. Fixed defenses double down on the explosives theme: Grenade Turret and EMP Turret (previously Fort Irongrad- and Signal Ridge-exclusive respectively) are both buildable here too, alongside the usual Turret/Missile Launcher/Walls. Starts with a heavy garrison from turn one since it has no infantry to garrison with otherwise.
